title: Dhurandhar
tmdbOverview: A mysterious traveler slips into the heart of Karachi's underbelly and rises through its ranks with lethal precision, only to tear the notorious ISI-Underworld nexus apart from within.
synopsis: Dhurandhar is a 2025 action, crime and thriller film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.3 on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
